artPrompt: A monstrous three-eyed mutant catfish surging up from a toxic reservoir in steep foreshortening, vast whiskered head and gaping maw thrust toward the viewer, slick scales glistening rust-red and murky green. Rusted pipes and crumbling concrete loom behind under a bruised stormy sky, sickly bioluminescence rippling off its bloated flanks, an unkillable bottom-dweller, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Incumbent Catfish
text:
Whenever any player votes, Incumbent Catfish gets +1/+1 until end of turn and you may declare it the winner of that vote regardless of the outcome. The reservoir has held office longer than the Mayor.
Trample
flavorText: Term limits do not apply to things that were never technically elected and have three eyes.
